products.name: Long Sleeve Casual Shirt - Dark Green
products.short_description: Relaxed-fit long sleeve casual shirt in a rich dark green tone.
products.description: A versatile everyday shirt crafted for comfort and style. Features a button-down collar, relaxed regular fit, and soft breathable fabric perfect for casual outings.

products.name: Long Sleeve Casual Shirt - Black
products.short_description: Clean and modern long sleeve shirt in classic black.
products.description: A versatile everyday shirt in timeless black. Button-down front, relaxed regular fit, and soft breathable fabric suitable for casual and semi-formal occasions.

products.name: Plaid Winter Shirt with Front Pocket - Light Grey & Navy Blue
products.short_description: Cozy plaid winter shirt with a practical front chest pocket.
products.description: Stay warm in style with this plaid winter shirt featuring a light grey and navy blue pattern. Includes a front chest pocket, button-down collar, and a relaxed fit for everyday comfort.

products.name: Plaid Winter Shirt with Front Pocket - Light Grey & Beige
products.short_description: Warm plaid shirt in a soft light grey and beige tone.
products.description: A cozy plaid winter shirt blending light grey and beige. Perfect for layering in colder months with a front chest pocket and comfortable regular fit.

products.name: Plaid Winter Shirt with Front Pocket - Beige & Black
products.short_description: Bold beige and black plaid shirt with front pocket for winter.
products.description: A sharp winter plaid shirt in a contrasting beige and black pattern. Features a front pocket and a regular fit, ideal for casual layering in colder weather.

products.name: Casual Long Sleeve Ribbed Shirt - Beige
products.short_description: Textured ribbed long sleeve shirt in a warm beige shade.
products.description: A casual ribbed-texture long sleeve shirt in a soft beige color. The relaxed fit and ribbed fabric make it comfortable for all-day wear, layering perfectly over tees or under jackets.

products.name: Regular Fit Buttoned Plaid Shirt - Beige & Black
products.short_description: Classic buttoned plaid shirt in a beige and black combination.
products.description: A timeless regular fit plaid shirt with full button-down front, in a handsome beige and black pattern. Suitable for casual and smart-casual looks.

products.name: Long Sleeves Checkered Casual Shirt - Brown, Black & White
products.short_description: A stylish three-tone checkered casual shirt for a bold look.
products.description: Make a statement with this long sleeve checkered casual shirt combining brown, black, and white. A modern casual look for everyday wear with a comfortable fit.

products.name: Black & White Checkered Casual Shirt
products.short_description: Crisp monochrome checkered casual shirt for a clean look.
products.description: A classic black and white checkered casual shirt with a clean, crisp aesthetic. Regular fit and long sleeves make it a versatile wardrobe staple.

products.name: Long Sleeve Casual Corduroy Winter Shirt - Dark Khaki
products.short_description: Textured corduroy winter shirt in a rich dark khaki shade.
products.description: Premium corduroy texture meets winter warmth in this dark khaki long sleeve shirt. A relaxed fit with subtle texture for a sophisticated casual style.

products.name: Suede Long Sleeve Shirt with Front Pockets - Black
products.short_description: Stylish suede finish shirt with dual front pockets in black.
products.description: A premium suede-textured long sleeve shirt in classic black with dual front pockets. Elevate your casual wardrobe with this sophisticated design.

products.name: Buttons Down Suede Long Sleeve Shirt - Army
products.short_description: Rugged army-toned suede shirt with a full button-down front.
products.description: Command attention with this suede long sleeve shirt in an earthy army green. Full button-down front and a relaxed fit make it perfect for outdoor or casual wear.

products.name: Buttons Down Suede Long Sleeve Shirt - Beige
products.short_description: Soft suede-finish long sleeve shirt in a warm neutral beige.
products.description: A warm and stylish suede-finish shirt in neutral beige. Full button-down styling with a comfortable regular fit, ideal for layering in autumn and winter.

products.name: Buttoned Long Sleeves Tartan Shirt - Light Blue & Black
products.short_description: A fresh light blue and black tartan shirt with full button front.
products.description: A refreshing take on the classic tartan pattern with a light blue and black color combo. Full button-down front with a regular fit makes it a standout casual option.

products.name: Relaxed Fit Flannel Plaid Shirt - Earthy Multi
products.short_description: Soft flannel plaid shirt with a relaxed fit in earthy multicolor tones.
products.description: Wrap yourself in comfort with this relaxed-fit flannel plaid shirt featuring warm earthy multicolor tones. Ideal for weekend adventures or casual everyday wear.

products.name: Solid Regular Fit Long Sleeve Shirt - Grey
products.short_description: Clean and minimalist solid grey long sleeve shirt.
products.description: A wardrobe essential – a solid grey regular fit long sleeve shirt. Pairs with everything from jeans to chinos for a clean, put-together look.

products.name: Long Sleeves Striped Regular Shirt - Light Blue & White
products.short_description: Classic striped shirt in a fresh light blue and white combo.
products.description: Timeless vertical stripes in light blue and white give this regular fit long sleeve shirt a clean, summery aesthetic. Perfect for smart-casual occasions.

homepage_banners.title: Unveil Your Style, Elevate Every Day
homepage_banners.subtitle: Everyone has a great outfit buried inside — find yours with our collection and style.

reviews.title: Awesome Product
reviews.body: I bought it 3 weeks ago and now come back just to say Awesome Product. I really enjoy it. Great quality, the fabric is soft and the fit is just right. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Perfect fit!
reviews.body: Great shirt. The colors are exactly as shown in the pictures. Delivery was fast and the product was well packaged. Will definitely buy again from Ravin.

reviews.title: Very nice quality
reviews.body: Good quality shirt, nice fabric. The sizing runs slightly large so I recommend sizing down. Otherwise very happy with my purchase.

reviews.title: Best purchase this season
reviews.body: The suede texture is premium and the black color doesn't fade after washing. Really impressed by the build quality for this price point.

reviews.title: Worth every penny
reviews.body: Excellent craftsmanship. The front pockets are nicely sized and functional. Compliments every time I wear it. Fast shipping to Cairo too.

reviews.title: Perfect for winter
reviews.body: Warm and stylish! The plaid pattern is sharp in person and the pocket is a nice touch. Great gift idea too.
